pkgmetadata.longdescription: OpenTelemetry B3 Propagatorpypi.. pypi image httpsbadge.fury.iopyopentelemetry-propagator-b3.svg target httpspypi.orgprojectopentelemetry-propagator-b3This library provides a propagator for the B3 formatInstallation------------ pip install opentelemetry-propagator-b3References---------- OpenTelemetry httpsopentelemetry.io_ B3 format httpsgithub.comopenzipkinb3-propagation_
